Ability Desc: Opponent must use selected Entity in combat next turn.
AMP: Opponent must declare selected Entity in combat next Phase. They cannot Attach Effect cards to that Entity.

Ability Desc: Deal 3 DMG back at the enemy Entity after hit.
AMP: Deal 5 DMG back at the enemy Entity after hit.

Ability Desc: Deal her ATK to all Revealed Entities other than herself.
AMP: Deal her ATK to all Entities other than herself.

Ability Desc: Permanently *copy* the ATK of the first Entity you attack.
Shuffle your Effect discard pile back into your Effect draw pile.
Negate the enemy Entity's ability during combat.
Keep attached Effect cards until the next turn.
